title: Recover C TX queue clock failure handling
description: Recover and independently validate the clock_gettime failure handling found in lichen/subsys/lichen/link/tx_queue.c. This hunk is not part of the Schnorr-48 wire migration and currently has no issue owner.
design: Keep this as a one-file hardening slice rather than coupling it to link wire-format recovery.
acceptance_criteria: Clock acquisition failure returns a deterministic error without consuming or corrupting queued frames; success behavior remains unchanged; a host fault-injection test covers the failure; sanitizer-compatible C tests and three independent reviews pass.
notes: Implemented fallible POSIX/Zephyr time acquisition returning -EIO before lock or mutation; default-deadline push validates first and uses one timestamp; uint32 wrap arithmetic is defined and half-range constraint documented. Host fault injection traverses platform helper and verifies queue count, full stats, output length/bytes, queued payload, invalid-argument precedence, and recovery. Plain and UBSan -Werror builds pass 18/18; AppleClang ASan hangs before main. Three direct hash-bound reviews found no in-scope blockers. Existing read concurrency/mutex lifecycle tracked as project-LICHEN-5ku5.
close_reason: C TX queue clock failures now fail closed without mutation
